summary: i18n bug fix testing complete - PASS. Verified 194 missing translation keys fix in en.json. All pages tested show NO [MISSING: ...] placeholders. Language switch to Portuguese and back to English works correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: i18n fix verified - 194 missing keys merged into en.json. parseMissingKeyHandler updated to only show [MISSING: ...] on localhost. All major pages tested: Command Center form, Settings, Reports, IAM/Users, Announcements, Categories. Language switch EN→PT→EN works.

iam_users_page.tabs_display: PASS - Users, Teams, Specialties, Roles, Account Types, Subscription Plans

announcements_page.empty_state: PASS - 'No announcements yet', 'Create Your First Announcement' display correctly

i18n_fix_verification.root_cause: Duplicate top-level JSON keys in en.json (commandCenter at line 404 and 1297, categories at lines 631, 1287, 1668) - last occurrence overwrote first

i18n_fix_verification.parseMissingKeyHandler_update: Now uses localhost detection instead of NODE_ENV for [MISSING: ...] display
